docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASILLAS, OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT CASTILLO, MANUEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
